text: "Self righteous and lame" + "insufferable" vs "fucking loser mindset" + "bitch and moan". I dunno dude. It sounds like you are quite disparaging and disrespectful too. Didn't you create this thread to "whine" and complain in the first place? If someone disagrees with you, your first response was pretty good. Then you just agree to disagree. I think the dude got you by getting you to stoop to their level.
label: analysis
notes: Rule 1 construction test: there is no comedic device, so it is not banter; it is a reasoned argument quoting the opponent's own words, closer to analysis than banter.

text: It’s just unnecessary and frankly disrespectful. This isn’t the time and place to say people are not good enough for X but could be good for Y as a lower tier blah blah blah. It’s a fun contest and the man is getting 1 minute of tv time. The hating was over the top.
label: reaction
notes: Rule 3: an emotional 'this is disrespectful / over the top' response tied to the just-happened commentary, with no standalone ranking or prediction, is reaction not hot_take.
